description: Complete the credit risk analysis in /home/ga/Documents/loan_portfolio_partial.xlsx by calculating the monthly payment, risk score, risk category, and expected loss for all entries. Populate the Portfolio Summary sheet and save the final spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/loan_portfolio_complete.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: The bank's credit risk spreadsheet at /home/ga/Documents/loan_portfolio_partial.xlsx is incomplete. Open it in LibreOffice Calc and complete all empty calculation columns: monthly payment (using standard amortization), risk score (using the bank's weighting table in the Risk Parameters sheet), risk category classification, and expected loss amount. Then populate the Portfolio Summary sheet with totals and averages. Save the completed workbook to /home/ga/Documents/loan_portfolio_complete.xlsx
